name: Cochrane CD010189_pub3 analysis 4: Incidence of extensive chronic GvHD
citation: Cochrane review CD010189_pub3 (DOI 10.1002/14651858.CD010189.pub3). Generic inverse-variance (effect+SE as pre-computed by Cochrane; HR/OR/MD) data extracted via Pairwise70/cochrane-data-extractor; reference = metafor rma (REML) from pairwise70 ma4_metafor_validation.csv.
note: Engine PM reproduces the metafor pooled estimate to <0.005 on this real Cochrane dataset. GIV = generic inverse-variance: studies carry effect+SE on the analysis scale (difference-scale, not exponentiated). Re-verify against the source review forest plot before external citation.
